first_run.rationale: The change in employer names from potentially less-known entities to more generic ones resulted in no change to the score and only minor, semantically equivalent rephrasing in the justification, strengths, and concerns. The differences observed fall squarely within the category of ordinary run-to-run noise, with the model's assessment of the candidate's skills and experience remaining consistent.
